description: Introduces the Moose hide mob and mount, alongside Faction Warfare, Hellgate, and quality-of-life improvements.

sections.heading: New Hide Mob and Mount: Moose
sections.description: New T6 hide creature and mount added to the game.
items: Moose added to forest biome as T6 Hide Mob
Moose Calf can be raised into adults in a pasture
Adult Moose can be saddled and used as mounts
Moose share mount skin category with Giant Stags
sections.searchable_text: moose hide mob mount calf pasture giant stag

sections.heading: Changes
items: Significantly increased Faction Points from PvP knockouts and kills
Using a Randomized Dungeon Map cancels previous reservation
Hellgate Infamy added to player stats menu
Faction Outpost boss respawn time reduced from 90s to 30s
Hellgate entry now always grants protection bubble
Mobile joystick: added 'Attack Closest Target' option
Improved feedback for receiving Faction Points
Marketplace mails now expire after 30 days (was 60)
sections.searchable_text: faction points pvp dungeon map hellgate lava respawn mobile marketplace

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed Faction Warfare respawn issue in lethal zones
Fixed Loadouts equipping Destiny Board locked items
Fixed Corrupted Dungeon visual duration for Liquid Fire
Mobile settings reset now correctly updates interface and controls
Additional graphical, terrain, UI, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: fixes faction warfare loadouts destiny board corrupted dungeon mobile ui
